body:
**Uberon term**

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0002835

**Suggested revision and reasons**

Dorsal root ganglia are not paravertebral/sympathetic ganglia. The thoracic ganglion currently have http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0002835 as a subclass.

Recommendation:
- remove thoracic dorsal root ganglion as a subclass of thoracic ganglion.
- clarify the name of thoracic ganglion (http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0002835) to thoracic paravertebral ganglion, since thoracic ganglion would more properly refer to ganglia that are within the thorax, including spinal, prevertebral and paravertebral ganglia
title: Remove Thoracic dorsal root ganglion as a part of thoracic ganglion
